Class UserController

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.controller.security.UserController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/v1/users") public class UserController extends Object

  • Method Details

    • getAllUsers

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<PUser>> getAllUsers()

    • getById

      @GetMapping("/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<PUser> getById(@PathVariable Long id)

    • getByUsername

      @GetMapping(params="username") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<PUser> getByUsername(@RequestParam String username)
      Search by username: GET /api/v1/users?username=peter

    • create

      @PostMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<PUser> create(@RequestBody PUser user)

    • update

      @PutMapping("/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<PUser> update(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody PUser user)
      PUT: Full update – replaces all fields. Note: password, roles and permissions are ignored. Dedicated endpoints exist for those.

    • partialUpdate

      @PatchMapping("/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<PUser> partialUpdate(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestBody PUser patch)
      PATCH: Partial update – only supplied fields are overwritten. The password is encrypted if supplied. Roles and the admin flag are not modifiable.

    • deactivate

      @DeleteMapping("/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Void> deactivate(@PathVariable Long id)

    • getSkillsForUser

      @GetMapping("/{userId}/skills") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<Set<SkillRecord>> getSkillsForUser(@PathVariable Long userId)

    • assignSkillToUser

      @PostMapping("/{userId}/skills") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<SkillRecord> assignSkillToUser(@PathVariable Long userId, @RequestBody SkillRecord record)
